subject: Waltrill, a small chibi-style black mage figure wearing a large dark pointed hat with gold clasp, seated with books and a lantern nearby
description: A small, round-bodied chibi figure in a massive dark pointed wizard hat dominates the frame. The hat is dark navy or black with a prominent gold clasp or brooch near the brim. The figure has glowing white dot eyes visible under the hat brim and wears dark robes with gold or yellow trim. The figure sits or crouches over what appears to be an open tome or book, with a decorative lantern visible to its right side. The overall style is the stylized chibi aesthetic characteristic of Final Fantasy Crystal Chronicles. The background is a soft light green or pale tone. The figure radiates a slightly ominous but also bookish, studious energy.
foreground: Small chibi dark-robed figure with oversized pointed hat and glowing eyes, seated with book
